revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[microformat]]s: *[[hAtom]] (class="updated") *[[hAudio]] (class="published") *[[hCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[hCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[hCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[microformat]]s: *[[hAtom]] (class="updated") *[[hAudio]] (class="published") *[[hCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[hCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[microformat]]s: *[[hAtom]] (class="updated") *[[hAudio]] (class="published") *[[hCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[hCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[microformat]]s: *[[hAtom]] (class="updated") *[[hAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]

revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[hAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[:en:HAudio|HAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[:en:HAudio|HAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[:en:HAudio|HAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[:en:HAudio|HAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[:en:HAudio|HAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[:en:HAudio|HAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables. Its use in hCard is for organizations, venues and similar; use {{tl|Birth date}} or {{tl|Birth date and age}} for people. Similarly, {{tl|End date}} returns the date as [[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]]'s (class="dtend"). See [[WP:UF|the microformats project]] for further details. === Limitation === {{UF-date-warn}} [[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

This template also returns the date, hidden by CSS, in the [[:en:ISO 8601|ISO 8601]] format needed by one or more of the following [[:en:Microformat|Microformat]]s: *[[:en:HAtom|HAtom]] (class="updated") *[[:en:HAudio|HAudio]] (class="published") *[[:en:HCalendar|HCalendar]] (class="dtstart") *[[:en:HCard|HCard]] (class="bday") usually, but not always, within infobox or similar templates, or tables.
